title: App Analytics is broken
excerpt:

Are you aware that App Analytics is broken and has been for a number of weeks? 
I mean this page… 
https://:account_slug.monday.com/apps/manage/:app_id/app_versions/:version_id/sections/analytics 
…it …

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
monday.com folks,

Are you aware that App Analytics is broken and has been for a number of weeks?

I mean this page…
https://:account_slug.monday.com/apps/manage/:app_id/app_versions/:version_id/sections/analytics

…it just shows the bouncy loader:

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rob and @dvdsmpsn!

Thanks for bringing this to our attention - I’ve alerted our support team! Would you mind opening a ticket so they can get a few more details from you? (Make sure you put Apps/API as the topic to route it correctly!)

Thank you so much!

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Done.

oOOo oOOoo
oOOo oOOoo
oOOo oOOoo
oOOo oOOoo

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for letting us and for opening the ticket

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Matias.Monday that ticket isn’t going well. Your help people say that to fix the problem I have to contact the app vendor, i.e. me.

I’m not continuing the conversation there as it’s pointless. . Your support people don’t appear to know about the core product.

I’m trying to help you folks, by letting you know about your stuff that’s broken.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @dvdsmpsn,

Would you please let me know the ticket number so I can take a look with the team?

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Matias.Monday Oh, btw, I don’t mind that it’s broken as I have other ways of calculating the same data.

I just thought you’d be keen to know about it.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

I’m glad you have a workaround for it.

If you have the ticket number I would still like to take a look into it if you are OK with it.

Cheers,
Matias
